input_pdb.description: Input PDB file, a folder of PDB files (ending with /) or .txt file containing multiple PDB paths (one per line)

tools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to run. Available tools: dssp,esm_1v,esm_if,peppatch,proteinsol,seq_composition

chains.description: Comma-separated list of chains to analyze, or use FULL to analyze all chains and/or EACH to analyze each individual chain separately.

peppatch_config_path.description: Path to pep-patch config file JSON

hydrophobicity_scale_path.description: Path to pep-patch hydrophobicity scale file
